message: Running Goose: Executing task: Create Main Application Script. Description: Develop the main script to serve as the...
objective: Build a simple Python weather CLI app that has separate modules for API calls and data formatting.
history: State: PLANNING - Specification created. Moving to planning...

tasks.title: Create Main Application Script
tasks.description: Develop the main script to serve as the entry point, handling user input, parsing command-line arguments, and invoking functionalities. Integrate argparse for command-line options like specifying a city, choosing units, and verbosity.

tasks.title: Develop API Call Module
tasks.description: Create a module named weather_api.py to manage all API interactions, setup API key and endpoint, fetch weather data, and handle errors. Ensure efficient use of API requests considering rate limiting.

tasks.title: Implement Data Formatting Module
tasks.description: Develop a formatter.py module for manipulating and presenting data. Include functions to parse raw API data, extract relevant information, and format it for CLI output in JSON or plain text formats.

tasks.title: Setup Development Environment
tasks.description: Configure the development environment for Python 3.8 or higher. Ensure compliance with PEP8 guidelines and design modules to be easily extensible or replaceable.

tasks.title: Design and Implement Unit Tests
tasks.description: Design and implement unit tests for the API and data formatting modules using unittest or pytest. Test scenarios should cover network failures, incorrect city names, and varied API responses.
